title: Splash About Splash Balls Neoprene Pool Toys
features: Fun, lightweight neoprene balls for water play
description: From the manufacturer Splash About Neoprene Water Balls Product Features Fun, lightweight neoprene balls for water play Encourages water confidence Pack of 2 Neoprene Balls Perfect for throwing and catching Product Description Children will have great fun in the pool throwing and catching these lightweight water balls. Throw them and watch them bounce across the water or use for a game of catch. Encourages water confidence. Splash About Dive Streamer help to increase water confidence as swimmers dive to the bottom of the pool to retreive the streamer toys. These Pufferfish Dive Sticks are cute and also great fun in the pool. Simply throw into the pool and watch them sink and dive down to retrieve them. Neoprene Splash Balls are great for the paddling pool and swimming pool to play splashes or catch. They are super soft and lightweight. These versatile little toys are perfect for the bath, paddling pool, garden and swimming pool. Made from natural Latex and painted with food grade paint they also make great teether toys. Pufferfish Flip and Float Toys make a great distraction toy in the pool. They can help improve water confidence and can be grabbed, thrown and chewed.
